summary:
RED HEIFER CEREMONY AND PROPHETIC TIMELINES: Brandon discusses recent reports from the Temple Institute indicating that the red heifers from Texas have been disqualified for the upcoming temple ceremony. Despite the widespread disappointment this news has caused, Brandon suspects a deliberate deception by the organizers to prevent riots or sabotage. He hypothesizes that a perfect, unblemished red heifer is secretly being kept in an undisclosed location for a covert sacrifice, potentially aligning with the Feast of Trumpets on September 23rd, a month he identifies as a period of significant change and acceleration.

GEOPOLITICAL CONFLICTS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon analyzes global political dynamics, pointing out a stark contrast between leaders seeking peace and those escalating war for financial gain. He mentions Benjamin Netanyahu's plans for Gaza and a scheduled meeting between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin in Alaska aimed at peace. In contrast, Brandon criticizes leaders like Emmanuel Macron and Volodymyr Zelensky, referring to Zelensky as a puppet, for perpetuating conflict to support the Euro and specific oil agreements. He reiterates Trump's vision for a golden age, a new crypto era, and a massive economic comeback for the dollar.

MEDICAL INTERVENTION AND DIVINE HEALING: Brandon addresses the controversy surrounding faith healing versus medical science, asserting that while Jesus is the ultimate healer, God frequently uses doctors, therapy, and modern medicine to help His people. He warns against religious extremism and spiritual bondage that rejects science, sharing a tragic family story where his aunt was permanently mentally handicapped after being bitten by a brown recluse spider because his grandparents refused to take her to a hospital. Brandon stresses that utilizing medical cures, including potential future artificial intelligence driven treatments for diseases like diabetes or autism, is perfectly acceptable as long as it does not contradict biblical principles or involve the Mark of the Beast.

PERSONAL TRIALS AND AUTISM DIAGNOSIS: Brandon shares a deeply personal account regarding his daughter Megan's autism diagnosis and the spiritual turmoil it caused his family. He admits to initially fearing the diagnosis due to rigid Word of Faith teachings that weaponized the concept of speaking things into existence, which led to a state of bondage where he refused to even say the word autism. Brandon describes the immense grief of the diagnosis and the hurtful judgment from other believers who blamed the condition on hidden sin or a lack of faith. However, he found peace through a profound divine visitation where God assured him that his past mistakes were not big enough to ruin his life and that God could turn any situation around for good.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF WEALTH AND JUSTICE: Brandon recounts several prophetic insights concerning economic changes and legal interventions. He describes a miraculous legal outcome where God entirely bypassed a liberal judge, Judge Torres, and caused two opposing parties to drop a case unexpectedly on a Thursday, exactly as he had foreseen. Furthermore, Brandon foretells a massive wealth transfer expected to accelerate between August and the first frost, mentioning visions of Donald Trump parading a pig with lipstick, signs of lowered taxes, and black onyx pillars representing economic safe havens. He also predicts the emergence of three new trillionaires, hinting at figures like Michael Saylor.

SPIRITUAL URGENCY AND INTIMACY WITH GOD: Brandon emphasizes the critical need for a genuine, intimate relationship with God, urging believers to seek God for His presence rather than merely for blessings or prophetic secrets. He warns that Jesus is not returning in September because there is still crucial work to be done and many souls are currently at risk of damnation. Brandon calls for a heightened sense of urgency within the church, criticizing the widespread spiritual apathy and encouraging people to fast, seek God's face in quiet places, and remain focused on their divine assignments.

MIRACULOUS TESTIMONIES AND FAITH MANIFESTATION: Brandon highlights the power of faith through various testimonies of answered prayers, no matter how big or small the request. He recounts a touching story of an elderly, grieving widower whose lost blue heeler dog was miraculously guided home by angels in the middle of the night following intercessory prayer. Brandon also mentions instances of physical healing, including a woman named Mary who experienced radical physical restoration. He encourages people to boldly write down their faith goals and persist in prayer for their specific needs, such as his ongoing belief for his daughter Megan to speak and communicate fully.
rawData: [August 10, 2025]-[What about the red heifer]-[https://youtu.be/9gOisW0RG9k]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us today. Well, it's Diana and Brandon today and we're so thankful that you all are watching us today. There's some things on my heart to talk about, but I didn't have a lot. But I told Diana, I said, "I feel in my spirit to make a video." I was out working in the yard, and there's a lot of things you all been discouraged about with the red heifers. They're saying at the Temple Institute that all the red heifers from Texas didn't qualify for the temple ceremony. And at first I was kind of like, "Man, that's a real bummer." I told Diana, I said, "Man, what does that mean, you know? Does that mean that delays the return of the Lord and all that?" But inside, I feel there's something afoot, you know, like I feel that there's something more to this because after she started studying it out, you know, I told her, she's like, "Oh no, Brandon, does that mean, you know?" And I said, "Hold on, let's just study and just what is it about the red heifer? What is it about all this stuff? Because people are so disappointed about it." So after Diana was doing the research on it, you know, and finding out that they're very secretive. They don't talk about things because it's very controversial and they don't want rioting. They don't want an uprising of any kind of governmental, of anything, you know. So, it's holy for one, a very holy thing to the Jewish people. And looking for this red heifer without any kind of—it can't have more than two red, different color hairs on it. It's a perfect red heifer. And so, supposedly, out of these cows, they didn't all qualify. They disqualified. So this is like how many weeks before the Feast of Trumpets? We have like seven weeks now, and they just come out and say this this week. And I thought, but they had a practice run. So they had their practice run, and they saw what it would be like to do this event. Hasn't happened in 2,000 years. And then all of a sudden this week they come out and say, "Well, sorry folks, it's all messed up. Not all of them are bad. We're not going to be able to do it at all now. It's back to stage one. We have to go looking for one, and we've been looking for all this time." So, could that be true? Yes. But I feel in my spirit, I'm just, you know—I don't have a word from God concerning it. I don't. But inside of me, I'm thinking, could they be trying to, you know, like sleight of hand again? "Don't pay attention over here. Don't pay attention over here as we're doing something over here," because they want to do it in September. I told you September is a very, very high alert month. This is the month. Here we go. We're just, you know, three weeks away from the month the Lord circled, and it was in red, and there was a cloud of dust on it. And He said, "This is a time of great change, great acceleration." And I thought, well, the Feast of Trumpets is in September, and that is the 23rd of September of this year. And so, could we have an event there that they sacrificed secretly? That, yeah, the heifers that they're telling you all about is in the front, and everybody said, "But they have one that's hidden in the back that they're not talking about just for safety." Because they said that if people knew where it was, people could try to hurt this thing. And if they hurt it and they do something to it or mess it up or whatever, it makes it not holy or sacrificable to be burnt or whatever they're going to do with it to make these ashes to build the third temple. It disqualifies it. So if they scar it, if they mess it up, you know, it disqualifies this red heifer so that they can't even use it. Yeah. Because it has to be without blemish. Without blemish. So they have to hide it. This red heifer is like cream of the crop. It's the best of the best, and it's probably worth a lot of money. So you hide it in an undisclosed location is what I believe, you know, and so let's just see what happens. If they come out on the 24th and say, "All right, we had our ceremony," and they have pictures and they tell everybody and they get the ashes of it and they do everything, and they want to dedicate the temple and get ready for everything, I just think we're just right there. Could it be delayed? I don't see it. But, you know, I mean, anything's possible. But I'm just thinking, wow, Lord, could we have a distraction over here while doing something over here in the night where everybody's watching, "Oh no, bummer," and all the Arab nations, everybody's like, "Well, we knew it was too good to be true, but you know, they all just leave it alone"? And then all of a sudden, they come out and go the day of, the day of or whatever, and have a big ceremony and tell everybody because they didn't want any kind of weirdness. So, we'll see. But we see Bibi saying we're going to take over Gaza. They want to do all this stuff. We see the meeting, another thing with President Trump and Putin in Alaska on the 15th. And this is what I thought was interesting, that Zelensky is saying, "We don't want nothing to do with it," you know? Here Trump is trying to cause a peace thing and we're going to do this. We're going to talk. We just want to talk things through. And then we have the puppet Zelensky going over. Huh? Zelensky. Zelensky. We have the puppet over here doing exactly what I told you, Emmanuel Macron and all these, that they don't want peace. I've already warned you all. How many times did the spirit of the Lord—the Lord said, "You didn't warn them"? He did. When we were praying and the Lord said they don't want peace. They want to escalate this thing. Why? Because of financial things, oil agreements, major escalation of war to support the euro, to support their economies. And this was concerning Canada. And the Lord even showed me Mark and him over there, and he was talking to the weasel, and they were all, you know, with Europe and with—I'm sorry, with England and with all the other things going on with all these other nations, with Germany in the background trying to figure out how they could escalate. And that's what the Lord was so upset about this because He was saying, "What would it be if it was their sons and daughters on the frontline?" If you all remember that prayer time we had. So Trump, I told you, he said, "I want peace." He was in the midst of it saying, "We want prosperity. We want a golden age, a new crypto age. We want all this stuff." And he's in the background saying, "We could make America great again. We can make the world—let's have a trading thing. Let's—in my term, I want it to be one of the greatest comebacks of all time of the dollar, about money, about everything." And I told you all, when I saw the new digital age, it was a new industrial revolution that the Lord was showing us was going to take place, that He said, "Watch AI and what they do with AI." And even in not the last video, but the video before, the Lord kept talking about even with the healings and all this. And boy, there are some of you who got really upset about that. I'm not talking about AI being your healer. Jesus Christ, ladies and gentlemen, let me tell you this: Jesus Christ is the only healer. He paid the price of 39 stripes on His back so that every single one of you can walk in freedom from sickness and disease, any kind of, all of it. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory over sickness. But can God use medical science to help you? Yes. And that's why I was trying to say—I even, even Oral Roberts raised up how many doctors through ORU to take to missionaries and help them to help these people that are sick, that modern science can help. I believe God is a good God and He can use anything He wants to use to help His people. He's not limited to say, "Well, you know, Jesus, I know He died for them, but if it comes down to modern science and it can help them, the only way through it is just by divine healing." I believe any kind of healing is divine healing. I believe anything that's good that comes from God is a healing, burden-removing, yoke-destroying power of God. That's like saying that somebody who's strung out on drugs can't go to rehab and get help, or if they have marriage problems, they can't get freedom and go to marriage counseling and talk it over. Well, you know, you go, and anything that's good that makes it better is good and it comes from God: counseling, therapy, whatever. The devil comes—and I'll say this again over and over and over again—the devil comes to kill, steal, and destroy. But God comes that we might have life, and life more abundantly. And whatever it takes you to get abundant life is God. Now, what's His perfect plan? Us to walk in divine health through His word. Yes. Do you hear that? His perfect plan is to walk in divine health through His word, finding scriptures that pertain to what you're believing for and standing on the word of God for the manifestation of what you're needing. Now, everybody's faith is at a different level. I have babies on here, and I have veterans on here. So, the veterans go, 'Hey, it should only be by the word of God.' But the babies are going, 'I don't know about the word of God. I just got born again yesterday, but I'm dying of this and I need help. But I found out if I go to the doctor, they'll help me.' Well, am I up in here to try to condemn you and say you shouldn't go get help? Heavens, no! It's like that—remember that joke where they said the guy was stranded on top of his house during a flood, and then a boat came by and he said, 'Hey brother, I see you're stranded there. Can I help you?' And he said, 'No.' He kept praying and saying, 'Lord, save me, help me.' And he said, 'No, I'm waiting on God to help me.' And then somebody else came by, like a helicopter or something, and tried to throw a lifeline down and help him, and he said, 'No, I'm waiting on God.' And then, sure enough, finally the flood rose high enough that he died. And then he went to heaven. And when he got there, he said, 'What happened? I prayed, and I used my faith, and I believed God that You would save me, but You never did.' And God said, 'I tried to. I sent the lifeboat. I sent the rescue helicopter. I sent all those people along your path, and you just didn't accept the help.' Right. And there are so many in the body of Christ who do exactly that. They only want divine encounters. And we have family that are like that, and I understand where you're faced. They say, 'Well, I don't even take a Tylenol if I have a headache. I don't do any of this stuff because I feel like it's going against the word of God.' But I'm like, I have family—even my grandpa wouldn't even go and put lotion on his hands because he thought it was against the word, because of using anything modern to heal him if it wasn't God healing him. And his hands would crack and bleed all winter long because he thought it was against the Bible to put lotion on his hands. I'm talking about spiritual bondage, to the point where my aunt got bit by a brown recluse as a young girl, and the authorities had to come and get my aunt from my grandparents to take her to the hospital. But by the time they took her and got her there, the brown recluse bite made her so sick that she became mentally handicapped and still is today, and still has massive seizures. And my grandfather's gone home to be with the Lord. But that was just the way it was. They just felt like anything that had to do with modern science, if it wasn't God touching you directly, then it wasn't God at all; you're just going to die. You know what I'm saying? And so my aunt is still mentally handicapped today, right now, and still has repercussions from that decision. And it was the wrong decision. It was the wrong—I'll say it right now—it was a wrong decision. She suffered her whole life because of someone else's decision, and it was because of that brown recluse. Now, that may make some people really mad, but I'm telling you, that's how extreme people get with this. I've been on the wrong side of this and the right side of it, watching people, and I'm telling you, there gets to be some bondage coming up in here where people can't even live. They go, 'Well, I can't even...' and you're like, 'There's a cure there.' I can tell you another one. There was another girl in that church who had problems, and they wouldn't even get her help, and DHS had to come and get her because the people were just being flaky. Yeah, you can get to the point where you're so religious and so brainwashed by things that it's like whenever they deal with snakes and dance around, you know, 'I'll touch any deadly thing and it won't harm me,' and they're dancing around with cobras and vipers and everything, and they bite them and they think, 'Well, I guess it wasn't meant for me to live. I must have had sin in my life because this cobra bit me, or the snake, or the copperhead, or whatever bit me, and I didn't go to the doctor to get it taken care of, so I died. But if it's meant for me to take up these serpents,' I'm telling people, there is life there. Those kind of people are out there. So, you just have to use wisdom in these last days is what I'm trying to say. I'm not trying to condemn anybody that doesn't believe in modern science. I'm not trying to say either way. I understand you follow the Holy Ghost for your life and don't be flaky. If you have a peace, you go with your peace, but there comes a point—there's wisdom behind everything we do. And God is a God of wisdom. And you say, 'Well, Brandon, I believe this.' I'm not trying to tell you to believe either way. I'm trying to tell you there's a balance of things. And I've seen both sides, and people get—when Megan was first diagnosed with autism, I was so scared because of the Word of Faith, of everybody saying you have what you say. Don't say that, because life and death is in the power of your tongue. Do you want that? And whenever I saw that she wasn't talking, I saw that things were going on with her and it was so bad, but I wouldn't allow other people to say the word 'autism.' In fact, if you said that word, I'd be ready to fight because I was scared of it. I was scared of the diagnosis of autism to the point where it was bondage. And even around her, we called it 'the A-word.' You know, 'the A-word, it looks like she might be...' It's flakiness, but that's where you get so much that you think, 'Well, I know that life and death is in the power of the tongue,' and I understand that you have what you say, you speak to the mountain, and you tell it to be removed and be cast into the sea, and if you don't doubt in your heart, you shall have whatsoever things you say. I believe that you are snared by the words of your mouth. I understand that. But there gets to be a point in time where you get flaky with stuff. And I'm not denying autism. I'm denying its right to be there. Yes, I'm denying its right to be there. I say it doesn't have a right to stay. I'm not denying the poor report of what all these neuropsychologists have said, because they're just doing their job, and all the therapists, and everybody who's ever tried to help us. At the beginning, we didn't want to do anything. But then the more we went to these therapists and the more they started helping us, you go, 'Well, is this God?' I was so grieved—I'm telling you all, this is a major deal because this is bondage. And I cried myself to sleep because of the diagnosis when the state people came into our house, and they evaluated her and they helped us, and they said, 'This is what she's going—what's the level that she's at,' and all the things. And when we went to the neuropsychologist, and the neuropsychologist told us, 'She'll be at this level for the rest of her life,' and all this death sentence is what you hear about a dream of what you had for your daughter, a marriage, a family, a job, everything that you ever wanted for her as a mom and a dad, to think that maybe one day, that moment of what that doctor was saying was basically a death sentence to those dreams. And at that time, that's all we could see. And in the midst, when you're that close to the trees and you can't see around them, and you have family telling you, 'Well, you know, it could be a devil. You know, if you just have faith, brother, and you go out there and pray and do this, and you fast more—you must not have enough faith to get her healed.' Do you know how that's like a kick in the gut? Especially from people that you love, and they tell you that kind of stuff, and they're so righteous and they can believe God for it so much better than you. But then you look at their life and they're more broken than you are. But they can't see outside of the trees because they're too close to their forest. They're broken. Their children are strung out on stuff. And you look at them and go, 'Come on, man. Everybody's a work in progress.' I'll tell you how many times I had people say, 'Well, you must have been in sin. You must be living in sin. What kind of sin do you have hidden in your closet that God's punishing you, and that all this happened?' And you know how many times I'd go home and just cry myself to sleep. I didn't know what kind of sin. I'd go and search all the time, 'Lord, what am I doing wrong? I must have a door open because the devil's up here eating my lunch and I don't know what to do,' and cry. That cost us our marriage. How many times did we say, 'I can't live this anymore. I have so much pressure on me. I've messed up time and time again,' blaming me, blaming Diana. 'Whose fault is this?' And all it came down to is: God is a good God, and the devil is a bad devil. And what the devil meant for bad, God had to turn it for good. When I told you I had the visitation with the Lord, and He took me out of my body again—I jumped through that portal, you can go watch that video—He took me to the past. He said, 'I want to show you the power of a decision.' It was a beautiful visitation I had with the Lord. And He said, 'Whatever you do and you mess up on, Brandon, if you're upright with me and you're seeking me, you're not big enough to mess up your life. You're not big enough to mess up your life, Brandon. The footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. And no matter how bad you mess up, or if you think you've messed up and derailed your life, I can turn it on a dime, son. No matter how bad the shots did this, or how bad this was with Megan or whatever, I can turn it around if you just keep in faith and believe me for it.' There's nothing too big, and there's nothing too small. God has paid the price for it all. And I don't know why I got off on this today because that's not even where I was going, but somebody obviously needed to hear it. But I'm telling you, oh, I know why—where I was going was about the AI and the things that I've seen coming with the healings of diabetes, cancers, and all the things the Lord told me are coming. Like I told you all, if it was for Megan and they told me, 'Hey, we have a cure for autism tomorrow,' this guy right here... If they are not requiring a Mark of the Beast chip in my hand or something in my forehead, and if it's not working anti-Bible—if it goes against the Word of God, you don't do it. Right. If it goes against the Word of God, you say, 'No, no, and heck no! I'm not going down that road.' But if it's not, then what's wrong with you? I would say, 'Yes, I'm going. We're going to go tomorrow.' What is it? An IV or whatever pill, and she's fixed. She goes, 'Hi, Dad. How are you doing?' You can take it to the bank, I'm going to do it. Some vitamin that God made, that they just discovered helps it. Because I know there's things on this earth that He made for us. There's Scripture to even back it: herbs and plants for the service of man. He talks about that in the Bible in Genesis. He said, 'I have given you all the herbs, the dirt basically, the plants, and everything for the service of man, to the service of us.' Yes. So if He gave us herbs, plants, and things for vitamins to keep our bodies strong, especially with how depleted our soils are... I take vitamins. I take all kinds of supplements to keep healthy because what we eat is depleted. But I'm just trying to help you all because there's so many people who get in bondage to things. And you say, 'Well, you know, hey, if it's making you better and you're going from glory to glory...' If you're on drugs—I have so many people say, 'Brandon, I'm strung out. I do acid when I'm watching you. I do this, I do that'—well, God doesn't want you on acid, man. God doesn't want you on meth. God doesn't want you on crack. God doesn't want you smoking marijuana and trying to see over in the spirit—you're going to get snared by a devil. The only pure way you're going to see in the spirit is not by a hallucinogen like, 'I do acid and I want to see over.' No, that is demonic spirits trying to mess with you, okay? It's only by the anointing and by the glory of God. That's the only way you're going to see and hear the Holy Spirit for real. So get sold out and get radical. Fast a little bit. Seek His face and you will find Him. Knock and the door will be opened unto you. Good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over as you give; men will give unto your bosom. I believe for favor beyond anybody. I'm talking—this is a time of favor. He's talking about it again. I was out in my flower bed and the Lord was talking to me about days of favor. Days of great favor for the youth. He said, 'Brandon, I'm going to do something huge in the youth. I want you to get ready for what I'm about to do with the youth in these last days.' And I stopped and I went, 'Wow, Lord.' I had open-eye vision. I was sitting out there, pulling weeds, doing stuff. And He said to me, 'I want you to get excited for what I'm about to do and have expectation for what I'm about to do with the youth in these last days.' And I'm like, 'Okay, let's do it. Let's be excited about it.' As we pray for our governors, we pray for our president, we pray for our spouses, the revival, and finances... as we see Judge Torres... I'm telling y'all, folks, I didn't see it happening any other way other than her. But God, when we did our live stream two or three days ago, four days ago now, whatever, and said, 'Let's pray for Judge Torres...' When we were praying in the spirit, He went around her, bypassed the liberal judge that was blocking everything—like, you know, being a poo-poo head, blocking everything—had two parties come to agreement and drop the whole thing, and it went away. Do you see what God did? I told Diana, 'I didn't know that could be done. I was praying for her, her, her, her, her.' And God's like, 'Here, boop!' And He went around the back door like He always does, and it was shocking to me. And I told her, I said, 'What does that mean? You're going to have to research it.' When I got the emails, people said, 'Brandon, it happened. It's over.' And I went, 'No, Judge Torres didn't do anything. What are y'all talking about? I'm praying over Judge Torres. Oh, God, help Judge Torres. I bind the devil on Judge Torres.' And God's like, 'I went through the back door and here I am.' And He made two parties agree and dropped the whole thing. And I went, 'What about Judge Torres?' She's not even in the equation anymore. But that's how big God is. And He shut the door completely. He was like, 'Don't you know, Brandon, My thoughts are higher than your thoughts? My ways are higher than your ways?' He is the God of more than one way to skin a cat." You know what I'm saying? Yeah. There's more than one way to get things done, folks. But in my mind, I thought, "Judge Torres. I'm praying over it." I'd go, "God, no." And then, when you hear His plan, you say, "Wow, that was way better than what I was trying to pray." Yeah. You didn't have to mess with the liberal judge. He just bypassed her and went the other way. His plans are beautiful. And it even happened on a Thursday. I had that written down. And the Lord said, "Well, it happened on a Thursday. Pray about the Thursday." And I told everybody, I even tried to tell you all Thursday without saying it, and I even brought up Thursday, "Let's pray about Thursday." But I don't, because there are certain things... Because everybody, because I have so many troubles, they go, "Well, that wasn't this Thursday," because I didn't know what Thursday it was. But the Lord said it will happen on a Thursday because you all, instantaneously, if I say Thursday, you're going to say, "It's this Thursday, and you missed it, brother." No, I don't know the Thursday. All I know is it's going to happen on a Thursday. And this is the time frame the Lord says to pray about a Thursday. So Braden, when it happened on Thursday, and Diana, they were all laughing because they said, "Wow, it was how many weeks later? Was it a month? Two months?" Yeah, I think it was about six to eight weeks later. Yeah, it happened on a Thursday. And they were laughing because it wasn't the Thursday that we were hoping for weeks ago. It was because He didn't know, I didn't know. All I know is I was praying over a Thursday. And when I went into intercession, we started praying, even in this last video. There are things that the Lord's showing me about August, September, and the time frame of a great acceleration of the wealth transfer going into the first frost. Remember the first frost, praying over the first frost. What does the first frost represent? The Lord said, "Not their first frost. What's your first frost?" So that's the next prayer assignment because He said, "Pray over the first frost for the kinging of the host, for agreements to be made concerning these things, and it will skyrocket double, triple, quadruple in the days ahead, praying over this." And as you saw Trump walking around with the pig. Remember I said he's walking around with the pig. He goes in through November, and I saw the housing market and things going up like this, and I saw it was transparent. I saw him walking this pig. I saw January. I saw lowering taxes on a sign, and he was excited about the sign. He was telling everybody, "Look at my sign." And he was walking around the pig, and it had lipstick on. He was so excited to parade this pig. And I thought, "Man, Lord, I know this represents something." And as you saw a new industrial revolution, and I saw the pillars again. I saw the black onyx pillars, and I saw the diamonds on them. And the Lord said, "These will become major things with safe havens." And I saw three—not saying these would be the only ones—three new trillionaires. Three new trillionaires. And I thought, "Well, Lord, that's amazing. Is that the only trillionaires?" No. What do these trillionaires have in common? What do these three trillionaires have in common? He's speaking about these three trillionaires for a reason. What do these three trillionaires have in common? They're all about something. But I don't get into that. I just give you little hints along the way because of the visions that I get about Michael Saylor and about the other guy and the other guy. And I thought, "Isn't that kind of interesting, isn't it, Lord?" So you just keep pushing. You just keep praying because He's painting a puzzle. He has the puzzle, and you're putting the puzzle together to tell you where we are in these end times. Where are we in this end-time calendar? Where are we in these end times? He said, "I'm giving you a window of opportunity to bring it, and there'll be one percent to handle the great wealth." If you're listening to Him and you have your head on His chest, and you're listening to Him as He breathes, He said, "I'm not going to yell and tell you things. I'm not going to scream anymore. I'm going to say it with a whisper."
